# UC-15.5.6 · CCTV RTSP Stream Packet Loss and Jitter Health

## Description

Lossy streams produce garbled evidence and false motion; network QoS issues show up before total disconnect.

## Value

Speeds collaboration with network teams on multicast and QoS.

## Implementation

(1) Probe or VMS-export RTP stats. (2) Map stream_id to camera. (3) Alert sustained >1% loss.

## SPL

```spl
index=physical sourcetype="nvr:rtsp" earliest=-4h
| eval loss=tonumber(coalesce(rtp_packet_loss_pct, packet_loss_pct, ""))
| eval jitter=tonumber(coalesce(rtp_jitter_ms, jitter_ms, ""))
| where loss>1 OR jitter>40
| stats avg(loss) as avg_loss avg(jitter) as avg_jitter by stream_id encoder_ip
```

## Visualization

Dual metric line; top bad streams.

## References

- [ONVIF specifications](https://www.onvif.org/)
- [Hikvision OpenAPI / ISAPI](https://www.hikvision.com/en/support/download/sdk/)
